series_metadata.series_description: This database is a complete list of all equipment in the possession of the Ohio Public Defender Commission. The list describes the dollar amount of each item (shows only items over $300.00 in value), the state ID number and a brief description of the ite

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain information in database until 2 years after equipment is retired and audit conducted by Auditor of State and audit report is released, then delete outdated information. Backups of files are conducted on a daily and monthly basis and these will be retained pursuant to retention schedules MIS-01 (daily) and MIS-02 (monthly), Electronic: Erase
